arts.ttl: Fulham vs Southampton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Fulham take on bottom-of-the-table Southampton in the Premier League on Sunday. Preview including team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Fulham receive transfer proposal for 'untouchable' Andreas Pereira
arts.sum: Fulham receive an 'initial proposal' from South American giants Palmeiras over a potential deal to sign midfielder Andreas Pereira.

arts.ttl: Southampton appoint Ivan Juric as new manager
arts.sum: During his decade in coaching, Juric has experienced an historic promotion with one club, before being dismissed three times inside two years by another. Juric arrives at St Mary's Stadium following a short-lived spell at Roma, where he was in charge for only 12 games, having been appointed by the Serie A club in September.

arts.ttl: Southampton appoint Ivan Juric as manager on 18-month contract
arts.sum: Former Roma and Torino manager heads to St Mary’s Manager awaiting work permit before taking reins Southampton have confirmed the appointment of Ivan Juric as manager on an 18-month contract. The Croatian, who was sacked by Roma last month, joins with the club bottom of the Premier League, having parted company with Russell Martin last Sunday. Juric is awaiting final work permit approval so Simon Rusk may take charge of Southampton’s game at Fulham on Sunday. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Southampton confirm appointment of Russell Martin replacement
arts.sum: Ivan Juric has been named as Southampton's new first team manager.

arts.ttl: Southampton unveil former Roma boss as new manager in bid to avoid relegation
arts.sum: Ivan Juric is ready for a ‘big challenge’ as he takes over a Southampton side struggling at the foot of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Official: Juric new Southampton coach and calls for ‘aggressive’ football
arts.sum: Former Torino and Roma coach Ivan Juric is officially the new manager of Premier League...

arts.ttl: Southampton confirm Ivan Juric appointment: Will the 49-year-old be in charge vs. Fulham?
arts.sum: Southampton confirm the appointment of former Roma head coach Ivan Juric as their new manager following the departure of Russell Martin.

arts.ttl: Ivan Juric makes ‘aggressive’ promise following Southampton appointment
arts.sum: Ivan Juric has outlined what to expect from his Southampton side after he was officially unveiled as manager on Saturday. The 49-year-old succeeds Russell Martin in the dugout with the club bottom of the Premier League table on five points having won one game out of 16. The Saints travel to Craven Cottage to take […] The post Ivan Juric makes ‘aggressive’ promise following Southampton appointment first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Club’s president an ‘asset’ as they chase Fulham star – Formed ‘closeness’ with player earlier this year
arts.sum: Andreas Pereira’s good relationship with Palmeiras president Leila Pereira is seen as key to the Brazilian side’s hopes of signing him in January. That’s according to UOL, who say Leila has become the club’s ‘asset’ as they try to get the midfielder out of Fulham.
